title: jurinea elbursensis
intro: Jurinea elbursensis, a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Iran, is a member of the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Jurinea elbursensis include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat wounds and skin infections.
